response.overview: Sohoyuro is a 1958 Sri Lankan film directed by A. Bhaskar Raj and L. S. Ramachandran. The film stars Clarice de Silva, Aruna Shanthi, Ravindra Rupasena, Leena de Silva, Ananda Jayaratne,  Pitipana Silva,  Eddie Yapa,  Joseph Seneviratne. Released on 15 March.Angeline Gunathilakemade his first film as a playback singer. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Sohoyuro
